title: Lesson 4 — More or Less

words.definition: to become less intense or widespread; to reduce in amount or degree
words.example: The storm finally abated just before dawn.

words.definition: to make suffering or a problem less severe
words.example: A cool compress alleviated the pain almost immediately.

words.definition: to make something bad less severe, serious, or painful
words.example: Sandbags helped mitigate the flooding downtown.

words.definition: to make an unpleasant feeling less intense; to soothe
words.example: He assuaged her fears with a calm, careful explanation.

words.definition: to make a bad or unsatisfactory situation better
words.example: New funding ameliorated conditions at the crowded shelter.

words.definition: to make a problem or bad situation worse
words.example: Shouting only exacerbated the panic in the crowd.

words.definition: to make worse; also, to annoy or irritate
words.example: Scratching the bite only aggravated the swelling.

words.definition: to make something larger by adding to it; to increase
words.example: She augmented her income with weekend tutoring.
Fresh data bolstered their argument for the new policy.

words.definition: to weaken or damage something gradually or secretly
to reduce, restrict, or cut short
words.example: The city curtailed water use during the drought.

words.definition: to prolong or draw out, especially needlessly
words.example: Endless objections protracted the meeting for hours.

story: When the river rose, city manager Dalia worked to [[mitigate|mitigate]] the damage before it could [[exacerbate|exacerbate]] an already tense night. Sandbag crews helped [[abate|abate]] the worst of the flooding, while volunteers tried to [[assuage|assuage]] the fears of stranded families and [[alleviate|alleviate]] their discomfort with blankets and hot food. Emergency grants [[augment|augmented]] the town's thin budget, and a steady radio broadcast [[bolster|bolstered]] public confidence. Dalia knew rumors could [[undermine|undermine]] the whole effort, so she [[curtail|curtailed]] wild speculation with honest hourly updates. Bickering officials threatened to [[protract|protract]] every small decision, and one careless order nearly [[aggravate|aggravated]] the crisis — but calm coordination [[ameliorate|ameliorated]] conditions by morning, and the exhausted crews finally rested.
